channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Raw bleach, 25th March
item.description:
There is constantly raw bleach being poured onto the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Credon Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes obstructing pavement, 25th March
item.description:
Yesterday there was one, now there are two. We need a defined area where people can leave them as there is in other areas of the borough. Asap!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not pothole . Street light has no shade, 25th March
item.description:
This is not a pot hole problem , street lighting in lawn road beckenham junction of law riad and Copers cope road Light has no shade , guard , shine directly into my home lounge and bedroom , we have reported this by phone

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lawn Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish thrown in street, 25th March
item.description:
Rubbish in road and on pavement outside number 16 Macoma Terrace

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Macoma Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Aston Martin with damage parked near us for weeks, 25th March
item.description:
We notice there is a car of high value which has been parked almost opposite our house for at least 3 weeks. The wing mirror has been knocked off and the tyres look pretty flat. We wonder if it is a stolen and abandoned vehicle

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rodway Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin collection, 25th March
item.description:
Black bin waste not collected from rear of 63 Woodcote Drive Crofton Estate Orpington
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodcote Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This flytipping is a safety hazard., 25th March
item.description:
There is a huge amount of flytipping which has been happening at the bins of 1 to 12 Lilian Close. This has been around for 2 weeks. There are rodents appearing and the wheelchair escape ramp to the community centre is now blocked.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lilian Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive grafgiti, 25th March
item.description:
Molesworth Street on bus stop L. Outside car park . Stop is currently closed Offensive graffiti on bus time table

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Molesworth Street, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (offensive)

item.title: Dog litter in this area and outside my front door is covering the streets - unbeareble, 25th March
item.description:
It seems like it has become the norm for dog litter to be spread over the pavement in this area I have had in the last 2 weeks outside my front door a huge heaping pile of dog poo it is unbearable - action must be taken! Can’t walk on the street!!!!!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lynmouth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 25th March
item.description:
Corner of cedar avenue Sidcup and burnt oak lane on the roadside
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Cedar Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chair and other rubbish dumped, 25th March
item.description:
A small chair and other rubbish dumped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swallands Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 25th March
item.description:
Pile of rubbish dumped - wood and other rubbish. Was driving so didn’t catch a photo. Please can a camera be placed here as it such a problem area
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swallands Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4/5 different sofas dumped, 25th March
item.description:
There are 4/5 different sofas dumped along the fence on the green at the end of swallands. This is becoming a real joke now. People are using this as a dump and the rubbish stays there for days. So sad.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookehowse Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped single mattress, 25th March
item.description:
Somebody has dumped a single mattress outside my house at No 81 Navarino Road in the nighttime
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Navarino Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 25th March
item.description:
Bromley zRoad junction of Newquay Road. Remove graffiti from bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Flytipping of cupboards & other matter in Lower Road, 25th March
item.description:
Tons of furniture flytipped behind green BT box corner of Lower Road & Kent Road on right hand side thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Lower Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light is day burning, 25th March
item.description:
Outside no 163. Street light column T2/31 is day burning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 163-165, Bromley Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned furniture, 25th March
item.description:
This cupboard was abandoned outside our house last week. Yesterday, it fell over in the wind and smashed. Today, it was incorrectly reported as having been removed - but it is still here

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maidenstone Hill, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This bike has been abandoned and is unusable because one of the pedals is broken off, 25th March
item.description:
This Forest bike has been on and off the pavement between 12O and 122 Westcombe Park Rd is various positions for about a week. I have tried to speak to Forest Bikes on three occasions since Monday to find a recorded message stating that there phones are out of action, There is no option to leave a message

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Park Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked footpath, 25th March
item.description:
The path to Erith station has been blocked off for many weeks causing much inconvenience. What is being done and when will it be finished? I have already contacted Thames Water but have had no reply
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bexley Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
